yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_CVE202621765__HCL_BigFix_Platform_is_aff {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for CVE-2026-21765 - HCL BigFix Platform is affected by insecure permissions on priv"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-02"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-21765" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "BigFix" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Public_PoC_Exploit_Released_for_NginxUI_ {

        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Public PoC Exploit Released for Nginx-UI Backup Restore Vulnerability"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-04-02"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

        date = "2026-04-02"

}

}

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 500 threat advisories. Of these, 117 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 118 as HIGH risk. 42 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-UNKNOWN, CDB-CYB-01, CDB-APT-22. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
